title: AES & RSA Encryption
description: AES-128 CBC mode and RSA PKCS1-OAEP encryption implemented in Python using PyCryptodome. Covers key generation, encrypt/decrypt operations for both ciphers, and a performance benchmark comparing throughput â€” illustrating the speed tradeoff between symmetric and asymmetric encryption.
shortDescription: AES-128 CBC and RSA PKCS1-OAEP encryption with key generation and performance benchmarking.
